narrative:
Precinct Liberty I (precinct in Jackson County) has 415 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
